name: Shannon Jackson, Our Revolution
subject: BREAKING: Puzder nomination withdrawn
body:
Momentum is on our side. The moment is now.
#
Sisters and Brothers,
Donald Trump's hand has been forced and it's all because of progressives like you: Andrew Puzder has withdrawn as nominee for Labor Secretary. This is huge: Puzder's withdrawal is a victory for working Americans.
Our Revolution has been on the front lines of the opposition to Puzder's nomination, joining with progressives across the country to flood Capitol Hill with calls and messages urging the U.S. Senate to reject Puzder. Within 24 hours, tens of thousands signed our petition opposing the nomination of Andrew Puzder -- and Congress heard us.
[**Momentum is on our side, but only if we take advantage of it. Donate $3 today and help Our Revolution turn the tide and fight for a progressive agenda.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0a23/43f17890/208227a0/62004a87/2703134149/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/or-momentum/?refcode=em170215-full")
Our Revolution will continue our fight to protect jobs and America's workers. We demand a Secretary of Labor who will support a healthy and safe workplace, a living wage, and equity at work. We will demand no less.
In the coming weeks, the Senate will be voting on cabinet picks who would be a disaster for America's families and the environment. Our next target, Scott Pruitt, Donald Trump's nominee to lead the Environmental Protection Agency, is in the pocket of corporations who have been fined for breaking environmental protection laws hundreds of times.
Wall Street is poised to take over Washington like never before. It is up to you to fight for placing American people ahead of corporate profits.
[**Because of people like you, we helped to stop the nomination of Andrew Puzder. Donate $3 to our people-powered revolution today and help keep the momentum going.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0a23/43f17890/208227a0/62004a87/2703134149/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/or-momentum/?refcode=em170215-full")
Together, there is no limit to what we can accomplish together.
In solidarity,
Shannon Jackson
Executive Director
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0a23/43f17890/208227a0/62004a87/2703134149/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/or-momentum/?refcode=em170215-full")**

Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123 "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
We need you to fight back against the media. |

Friend, You know that I don’t trust the media to report on anything we achieve. Instead, you -- the American people -- are our last line of defense against the media’s hit jobs. You are our greatest asset in helping our movement deliver the truth to the American people. Which is why I need you to take the Mainstream Media Accountability Survey to do your part to fight back against the media’s attacks and deceptions. Over these next four years, our movement will be subjected to some of the nastiest attacks you can imagine. But just like during the campaign, we need to stay focused on getting the job done and accomplishing our shared goal to Make America Great Again! That’s why I’ve made it a point to cut through the media’s noise and go straight to the American people. It worked during the campaign, and it will work again over these next four years. But I can’t do it alone. I need you by my side, supporting our message and doing your part to get the truth to the American voter. Please take the Mainstream Media Accountability Survey to do your part to fight back against the media’s attacks and deceptions. Thank you, Donald J. Trump

body:
Hello everyone,
Lt. General Michael Flynn's appointment as National Security Advisor was always deeply troubling given his close connections to Russia and Vladimir Putin, and his resignation was an appropriate step.
I, like many Americans, have many outstanding questions about the situation. [**That's why I am asking you to add your name and join me in calling on Congress to conduct a thorough and comprehensive investigation into General Flynn and the Trump administration's ties to Russia.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd02/2a380d31/140015b4/fed064/135740892/VEsH/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/20170216_Flynn?source=20170216_flynn_all")

Given Russia's shameless attacks on the foundation of our democracy, it's critical that we fully investigate Russia's involvement with Lt. General Flynn and the Trump Administration, and any national security threats that this contact may have posed.
[**If you agree that we must uncover the truth and ensure that our country 's safety and security is the Trump administration's top priority, please sign the petition now.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd02/2a380d31/140015b4/fed064/135740892/VEsE/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/20170216_Flynn?source=20170216_flynn_all")

name: The White House
subject: President Trump Meets with Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu
body:
We are reaffirming our relationship with Israel. |
[](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=34fe1cb64ab56466920f3e08bcb1c2ea25774bca3edd4d2bdf53b00d34dceed5050bc7de963d1ae355926f4657efb259845bdce75211e22e)

President Donald J. Trump was delighted to have Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu as his honored guest yesterday, and is looking forward to strengthening the relationship between the United States and Israel.

President Trump has made it abundantly clear that the United States stands firmly with our ally Israel, especially in the face of terrorism. Our deeply rooted ties reflect our shared values, strategic interests, and dynamic economic and trade relationship. President Trump is making it his administration’s duty to promote Israel’s security in order to establish a more peaceful and prosperous Middle East.

[](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=34fe1cb64ab56466920f3e08bcb1c2ea25774bca3edd4d2bdf53b00d34dceed5050bc7de963d1ae355926f4657efb259845bdce75211e22e)
Yesterday's meeting represents a key step toward strengthening security and counterterrorism operations to protect the United States, Israel, and other nations from the growing threat of terrorism around the world. The President and the Prime Minister agree on the importance of tough sanctions and constant vigilance to ensure the safety and security of all.

As Israel’s largest bilateral trade partner, the United States is eager to expand its economic partnership, which is nearing $50 billion annually. President Trump reaffirms the unbreakable bond between the two nations, and together with Prime Minister Netanyahu, is finding new ways to make our alliance even stronger.

**[Stand with President Donald J. Trump and Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=34fe1cb64ab564660fd92fc459be1ff1f57f0c95140c53604e9a2e311a6d28cdb4b15d2db8bbe837d9f721b12c78ac52f41b4e8382311ea9)**

**[President Trump Stands With Israel](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=34fe1cb64ab56466920f3e08bcb1c2ea25774bca3edd4d2bdf53b00d34dceed5050bc7de963d1ae355926f4657efb259845bdce75211e22e)**

[Privacy Policy](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=34fe1cb64ab56466c7460d15df47187004336ab99a18902c725c75b8d8903df18796537b3b15433a89c3e6ecacc9b2e4d98f29894ec5ddb0) [Contact the White House](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=34fe1cb64ab56466355b93a806c069b20549a2883422ad4199bff46d14b694688592aaa2d9edfceb5d3a7a5bfe505abb92745f1e81417f23)[Unsubscribe](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=b92ce13652755ceab8a2314a0f79359da79cd41e689d669cb591fde14bfc2d93d358de4e029b7798ee6e9faddcf19bcb84af011026b38ee1)

name: Update (via DSCC)
subject: re: Andrew Puzder's withdrawal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Trump now knows his extremist agenda will force the people to speak out and successfully defeat him.
---
[](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ecbc/2b07114c/458275b9/736a9ba6/3851568754/VEsH/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/pledge-stand-with-senate-democrats?source=PT-20170216-UpdateDS-ProsHV")
Friend --

Last night, Andrew Puzder withdrew his nomination to serve as President Trump's Secretary of Labor.

That's a victory.

It happened in part because people from all over the country spoke out against this wealthy fast food CEO and his contemptuous record against workers -- those actions built the momentum exposing how unfit he was to run the Labor Department.

Puzder came under fire for opposing the minimum wage, criticizing paid sick leave policies, and pining for a day when human employees could be replaced with technology.

And when Mitch McConnell could not spin these damaging reports -- the **Republican leader had to tell Trump that he could not deliver the confirmation votes for Puzder** before his first Senate hearing.

**[Friend, we made the truth clear, fought back, and won this round. To keep the pressure on, will you pledge to stand with Senate Democrats in the fights ahead?](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ecbc/2b07114c/458275b9/736a9ba6/3851568754/VEsE/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/pledge-stand-with-senate-democrats?source=PT-20170216-UpdateDS-ProsHV")**

From Day 1, we established that Puzder was an insult to the department that protects the American worker.

Then we bled away his support -- and eventually, 12 Republican senators joined every Senate Democrat in refusing to support his nomination.

It's the first Trump Cabinet nominee we struck down. Now, the President knows what the power of the people can do.

**This is your victory, friend.** But we need to remain vigilant for whatever comes next -- including when Trump announces a replacement nominee for Puzder.

**Show you 're still in this fight with Senate Democrats. Pledge to stand with us:**

**[https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/pledge-stand-with-senate-democrats](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ecbc/2b07114c/458275b9/736a9ba6/3851568754/VEsF/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/pledge-stand-with-senate-democrats?source=PT-20170216-UpdateDS-ProsHV")**

Over these next four years, our movement will be subjected to some of the nastiest attacks you can imagine. But just like during the campaign, we need to stay focused on getting the job done and accomplishing our shared goal to Make America Great Again! That’s why I’ve made it a point to cut through the media’s noise and go straight to the American people. It worked during the campaign, and it will work again over these next four years. But I can’t do it alone. I need you by my side, supporting our message and doing your part to get the truth to the American voter. Please take the Mainstream Media Accountability Survey to do your part to fight back against the media’s attacks and deceptions. Thank you, Donald J. Trump TAKE THE SURVEY Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. subject: re: Paul Ryan doing Trump's dirty work
body:
Unconscionable

**There are no questions anymore about whether Paul Ryan and House Republicans will act as a check on the Trump White House -- they won't. Pitch in $3 or more today so we can win back the House in 2018 and keep Trump in line.

** **[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c6f7/4067b0a/2cb553bb9/7e7a9d98/57054268/VEsH/ "http://my.democrats.org/Ready-for-2018-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20170216_dnc3_nd&source=em_20170216_dnc3_nd&refcode=em_20170216_dnc3_nd")**
Friend --

For the past week, we have heard reports about undocumented immigrants all across the country being detained by Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) under circumstances that are anything but routine. Like the 23-year-old DREAMer in Seattle who was taken from his home last week and is being detained -- despite having no criminal record. Or the woman in El Paso whose domestic abuser possibly tipped off ICE to arrest her after she received a protective order against him.

The Trump administration's deportation force has brought fear and anxiety to Latino and immigrant communities -- and their Democratic representatives in Congress want answers.

Instead, ICE abruptly cancelled a meeting requested by the Congressional Hispanic Caucus. Then, just this afternoon, several Democratic Hispanic Caucus members were kicked out of a bipartisan meeting -- that they originally called for -- with the acting director of ICE by Speaker Paul Ryan's staff, who were acting on the White House's instructions. Several other Hispanic Caucus Democrats were barred from entering entirely.

Trump is scapegoating immigrants, breaking up families, and making us all less safe -- and it is unconscionable that Paul Ryan is carrying out the White House's authoritarian impulses to keep his colleagues from getting the answers they deserve.

There are no questions anymore about whether Paul Ryan and House Republicans will do their constitutional duty to act as a check on the Trump White House's abuses of power -- they won't. Pitch in $3 or more today so we can win back the House in 2018 and keep Trump in line.
